name: Starka
description: Tucked into Kazimierz off Plac Nowy. Two cosy red-walled rooms with Heinrich Zille graphics; modern takes on Polish classics built around Mrs Rysia's pierogi, slow-cooked mains, and Gabriel's homemade vodka infusions. Live acoustic music Wed & Fri at 20:30.
